title: Add Cadavre Exquis Generator to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Exquisite corpse, pixel perfect
gist.blurb: The Cadavre Exquis Generator has sprouted in the greenhouse! Mix and match prompts to generate wild, tri-style collaborative artworks.
gist.summary: Added the Cadavre Exquis Generator to the community app showcase, a tool for generating tri-style composite AI images.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover and use this new community-built app to experiment with multi-style image generation.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot collaborating on a three-part 'exquisite corpse' painting on a canvas, representing the tri-style image generation of the new app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a tall canvas alongside a chunky monitor-head robot. The canvas shows a funny three-part 'exquisite corpse' drawing with different styles in each section. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a tall canvas alongside a chunky monitor-head robot. The canvas shows a funny three-part 'exquisite corpse' drawing with different styles in each section. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
